Saffron Rice Pilaf

Serves: 4
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cook Time: 25 minutes

Ingredients:
- 2 cups basmati rice
- 1/4 tsp saffron threads
- 3 tbsp butter
- 1 large onion, finely chopped
- 4 cups chicken stock
- salt to taste

Directions:
1. Rinse the rice until the water runs clear.
2. Saute the onion in butter until golden.
3. Add rice and stir to coat, then add stock and saffron.
4. Simmer covered for 18 minutes, then rest 5 minutes.
<<<PAGE>>>
Lemon Garlic Chicken

Servings: 2
Prep Time: 1 hour 15 minutes
Cook Time: 30 min

Ingredients
½ cup olive oil
4 cloves garlic, minced
2 lbs chicken thighs
1 lemon
fresh parsley for garnish

Instructions
Marinate the chicken in oil, garlic and lemon juice for one hour.
Roast at 425F until the skin is crisp, about 30 minutes.
Garnish with parsley.
<<<PAGE>>>
A Note From The Author

This chapter is all about weeknight cooking. Thanks for reading!
